title: (BME) Bean's Military Emporium
description: Bean's Military Emporium adds military apparel to Minecraft, including uniforms and plate carriers. The mod currently features 19 camouflage patterns, with more planned in future updates. Perfect for roleplay, PvP, or adding a tactical touch to your game.
body:
![mod title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00d9b0d826ebd6b41dd5cc29ae07149808b6ab9e.png)Bean's Military Emporium brings military-style gear to Minecraft, allowing players to equip detailed uniforms and plate carriers for a more immersive tactical experience. Whether you're preparing for intense PvP battles, military roleplay, or just want to add a combat-ready look to your character, this mod has you covered.![OD Gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e434c32d81bb45876fd80df9793926aa2503fe8.png)
![title card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d92146d3d9222e1d89818d377a7cae0e3d14bfc.png)
🪖 Bean's Military Emporium — Update 3.0.0
“The Refit Update”

THATS RIGHT FOLKS, WE SKIPPED 10 UPDATE NUMBERS!!

Bean's Military Emporium returns with its biggest update yet! Version 3.0.0 brings a full rework of the mod's core visuals, refining nearly every armor model and texture to deliver a more immersive and detailed military aesthetic. From boots to ballistic plates, everything has been redesigned to look sharper, cleaner, and more authentic.

🔧 What’s New:
Complete Model & Texture Overhaul
All existing military armor sets have been remade from the ground up with higher detail and improved proportions.

Fighter Pilot Helmets
Gear up for air superiority with newly added fighter pilot helmets—perfect for jet-based mods or roleplay scenarios.

Polish & Performance
Optimized models for better performance in-game without sacrificing visual quality.

New Color Variants & Small Additions
Subtle new gear types and color tweaks to support broader customization and roleplay flexibility.

# **REQUIRES CURIOS API**
